CustomField.label: Tooling Named Credential
CustomField.description: Developer name of the Named Credential the Tooling API client calls through (callout:<name>/services/data/...). Configurable so the same-org credential can be renamed without redeploying Apex. NortConfig falls back to 'Nort_Tooling' when blank.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Named Credential developer name for same-org Tooling API callouts (e.g. Nort_Tooling).
